epigraph.quote: We bought ice creams, my first since Thorpeness last summer.

moments.place: Dyffryn Gardens, Vale of Glamorgan, Wales
moments.quote: They took us to Dyffryn Gardens where Simon & Eben played in the log garden.
We walked 4 miles & back along the coastal path, first where the sheep graze on the salt marshes to Llanrhidian.
